title: Tony Warnock
text: Home * People * Tony Warnock Tony T. Warnock , an American mathematician and Research Fellow at the Information Sciences Group CCS-3 at Los Alamos National Laboratory . Along with Burton Wendroff , Tony Warnock is co-author of the Chess program Lachex , which competed at various ACM Tournaments and World Computer Chess Championships [1] in the 80s and early 90s.
